name: Forge — Sheet → App Onboarding & Payment Sync

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ student_id: $json.student_id, email: $json.email, full_name: $json.full_name, phone: $json.phone, city: $json.city, product: $json.product, payment_amount: 15000, edition_id: $json.edition_id, edition_name: $json.edition_name, edition_city: $json.edition_city, cohort_type: $json.cohort_type }) }}
